original_text: Revenue concentration and margin sustainability present potential risk factors. Revenue grew from $26,974,000,000 in FY 2023 to $215,938,000,000 in FY 2026, representing substantial expansion that may be difficult to sustain at similar rates [CHUNK_ID: 81f38fe0-8081-4f24-8b98-ad1f02449fab, CHUNK_ID: d9715ca6-9ea9-4dfa-978c-0f9b46c5ec7b]. Gross profit increased from $15,356,000,000 to $153,463,000,000 over the same period, with FY 2023 gross margin at approximately 56.93% [CHUNK_ID: 13d776a2-5c4c-45d8-9f79-d7dfc9d82d90, CHUNK_ID: bb71bc88-ddc4-4b1f-ab5b-277bf6280c37, CALC_ID: fa1892bc-aa54-4657-b161-d3604764ec70]. The company sells to diverse customers including OEMs, cloud service providers, automotive manufacturers, and distributors across multiple geographies [CHUNK_ID: 812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. While this diversification may mitigate single-customer dependency, the rapid revenue growth trajectory suggests elevated expectations that could pressure margins if growth moderates or competitive dynamics intensify. Evidence on specific customer concentration or geographic revenue breakdown is insufficient to quantify this risk more precisely.
revised_text: Revenue concentration and margin sustainability present potential risk factors. Revenue grew from $26,974,000,000 in FY 2023 to $215,938,000,000 in FY 2026, representing substantial expansion that may be difficult to sustain at similar rates [CHUNK_ID: 76fd1884-5c53-4fe5-97f0-d7b7352ee252, CHUNK_ID: cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a]. Gross profit increased from $15,356,000,000 to $153,463,000,000 over the same period, with FY 2023 gross margin at approximately 56.93% [CHUNK_ID: 76fd1884-5c53-4fe5-97f0-d7b7352ee252, CHUNK_ID: cdffc354-305b-4c6d-9459-624d8d18147a, CALC_ID: fa1892bc-aa54-4657-b161-d3604764ec70]. The company provides graphics, compute, and networking solutions across multiple geographies including the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally [CHUNK_ID: 812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. While this geographic and product diversification may mitigate single-customer dependency, the rapid revenue growth trajectory suggests elevated expectations that could pressure margins if growth moderates or competitive dynamics intensify. Evidence on specific customer concentration or geographic revenue breakdown is insufficient to quantify this risk more precisely.
changes_summary: Fixed three major citation mismatch issues: (1) Replaced generic revenue chunks with income statement chunks that explicitly specify fiscal year dates (76fd1884 for FY 2023 dated 2023-01-29, cdffc354 for FY 2026 dated 2026-01-25); (2) Applied same fix to gross profit citations to verify FY attribution; (3) Revised customer type claim to accurately reflect chunk 812d4743 content, which describes product segments (graphics, compute, networking) and geographies rather than specific customer categories like OEMs or cloud providers.
